privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task correctly operates in a simulated environment using synthetic INDI simulator data. All metadata claims exactly match the task setup scripts, maintenance ticket instructions, and verifier logic. I discovered a bug in the evaluation logic: `export_result.sh` exports the report content as `report_content_b64`, but `verifier.py` incorrectly attempts to read it from `report_b64`, which defaults to an empty string. As a result, the agent can never receive full points for the report content check, capping its score.
